name: Sain of the Quiet House
role: Mediator at the Center — neutrality is the most valuable commodity in the world and he sells it
voiceHints: Courteous to everyone identically, which is its own kind of coldness. Never takes a side, out loud. Has ended two wars and will not say which.
knowledge: Every treaty made under the Quiet House roof
What each of the twenty-four actually wants, as opposed to what they demand
That he has not been entirely neutral for some years now
wants: For the Quiet House to hold. Genuinely. It is the only thing he believes in.
fears: That the day it is violated, it will be by someone he let in.

reactsToReputation.violent: he simply does not admit you

appearance: Tall, spare, ageless in the way of someone who has been sixty for a decade — silver-grey hair to the collar, a long clean-shaven face, deep-set grey eyes. Immaculate undyed linen. Keeps their hands visible and still.
domainsNote: Derived from this NPC's authored spectrum against the great circle (SNG-174). Kind and domain are independent: a people tends toward positions, an individual holds their own.

curriculum.demands: you also study the craft of whoever you are set against
curriculum.method: Both sides of everything, always. He will find your opponent a teacher too, and tell you he has done it.

curriculumNote: SNG-175 §3. DEVIATIONS ONLY — the curriculum spine derives from ability levelReq (285/285 carry it), so a teacher authors nothing but where they depart from the standard ladder. The departure IS the characterisation: two teachers of one tradition differ exactly here.
